verses.1: My son, don’t forget my teaching,
verses.2: for they will add to you length of days,
verses.3: Don’t let kindness and truth forsake you.
verses.5: Trust in the LORD with all your heart,
verses.6: In all your ways acknowledge him,
verses.7: Don’t be wise in your own eyes.
verses.8: It will be health to your body,
verses.9: Honor the LORD with your substance,
verses.10: so your barns will be filled with plenty,
verses.11: My son, don’t despise the LORD’s discipline,
verses.12: for whom the LORD loves, he corrects,
verses.13: Happy is the man who finds wisdom,
verses.14: For her good profit is better than getting silver,
verses.15: She is more precious than rubies.
verses.16: Length of days is in her right hand.
verses.17: Her ways are ways of pleasantness.
verses.18: She is a tree of life to those who lay hold of her.
verses.19: By wisdom the LORD founded the earth.
verses.20: By his knowledge, the depths were broken up,
verses.21: My son, let them not depart from your eyes.
verses.22: so they will be life to your soul,
verses.23: Then you shall walk in your way securely.
verses.24: When you lie down, you will not be afraid.
verses.25: Don’t be afraid of sudden fear,
verses.26: for the LORD will be your confidence,
verses.27: Don’t withhold good from those to whom it is due,
verses.28: Don’t say to your neighbor, “Go, and come again;
verses.29: Don’t devise evil against your neighbor,
verses.30: Don’t strive with a man without cause,
verses.31: Don’t envy the man of violence.
verses.32: For the perverse is an abomination to the LORD,
verses.33: The LORD’s curse is in the house of the wicked,
